hero.title: Anmizlay
hero.lead: IATF itaj alxidmat net daɣ addinat s almaɣna net. addabara tan n addabara, imutiyan n kod, imuttiyan n alxakum d alqim tan n axadam iktaban daɣ idagan n addinat

items: Ikayadan win ašəɣəlan Alxidmaten tin ijjuch, aɣazan d asimmuti n addabara tan iktaban chund muchakil tan meɣ ifukkiran daɣ edag n isuj win alxidmat tolas ikf-an akayad daɣ rejisir n addinat ašareɣaEqal awendǎɣ .

Əlkaman ən alkadan. Ikitban win aduniyat iknanen aɣazan daɣ taggayt tan IATF GitHub, fal website wen, meɣ fuk nasan. ikitban addoben afissar, amukin meɣ asammuti n arɣum wan alasal i ad ajjin akayad n derhan n ijjuch n isalan n awadim war n ilkem i isalan wi war n oɣed
Əmik eqal amutayan. Hak amutti n kod eqqal commit n addinat fal repository Taggayt tan GitHubEqal awendǎɣ .
Imuttiyan n alxakum Isuj win ašrut wan axakam ijjan fal akarach n alxidmat n awadim iatf-website Akayad ən ehan wan alkadan. Tanfust ən assəməsədəw fal GitHub
Alqim tan n alxidmat IATF itaj alqim tan n alxidmat andarran tolas iktab alqim n asidu n isalan win alxakum ijjanen har ajjudi. ɣur awatay wan 2022, alqim wa ezzaran eqqalan ismawan n ifrinkittan
Əmigridan wən təmotayen. Ikitban n akayad meɣ addabara fuk ehan daɣ GitHub majrad fal repository olaɣan akayad Majrad tan Daɣ iatf-website ehan wan alkadan.

paragraphs: IATF ikna iddikud andarran n tijittawen net. ɣur awatay wan 2022, alqim wa maqqoran n alxidmat eqqal ismawan n tawset. hosting exdam s free-tier megh low-cost infrastructure alwaq wa id addobat awen
Akatab wen war eqqel addabara n azruf iknan audit eqqal log n alxidmat n alxakum i edey wa s exdam IATF online
operatingCosts.footnote: Receipt tan addoben ad ikrichan ismawan meɣ ad ijjichan darat amukin nasan. ihandagan win addinat, isalan win azruf d isalan wi war n ila alxidmat war aqqel nat achrut n alisteɣmar n addinat

header.title: Awa war n amos n addinat fuk

paragraphs: Iyad haratan aqalan aygmadan daɣ alkadan ən adinat dǎɣ əšiɣil:
items: Isalan win isikilan n awadim wa ijjan addabara tan
Akatab wan awadim exdam ɣas i asifham n arori data ijjuch net, asabbahu net meɣ afissar net
Adriš tan win awadim, ismawan n telefon d isalan n awadim war n ila derhan
Harat kul wa s addobat awadim musnat n awadim axadam n teknoloji tan tin alɣidmaten war n ila turhajat
Əmigridan wən Raw Discord, afal əšiɣilan iyad aqalan atiwasanan fal alkad ən tartit tan adinat.

header.title: Alxakum eqqal alkittab n achareɣa tan win isuj win

paragraphs: A fal arha ad afhaman immik wa s it ijjan timašɣulen, arxiv tan meɣ amutti nasnat, teɣare n achrut wan axakam
